notes: Loop toggle joins the play shuttle as the leftmost button, ahead of Prev / -15s / Play / +15s / Next (now a 6-column grid). Loop active states (Loop one, Loop folder) recolored to a slightly more saturated blue rather than amber — all three loop states are now in the cool blue palette. The icon itself (slashed-repeat / repeat-1 / repeat) carries the state distinction. Speed gets the secondary row to itself.
